assertions.description: 11 components, 10 nets, BOM values and footprints correctly extracted. RC filter detection found the R2+C1/C2 phase-shift network (47K, 100nF, 33.86 Hz cutoff). No false positives on voltage dividers, regulators, or bus interfaces. Missing MPN flagged for 10/11 components (only FL1 has MPN) — correct.
